title: NEWSROOM: Single-file HTML news dashboard
text:
Build a single-file applet HTML news dashboard with these specs:

LAYOUT
- Magazine-style card grid with 3 tiers:
  1. Breaking News — 1 hero card (large) + 1–2 standard cards, 2-column grid
  2. Major Stories — 3-column grid of medium cards
  3. International — 4-column compact card grid
- Sticky header with logo, live clock, and "LIVE" indicator
- Market ticker bar below header

THEME: [Dark editorial / Light minimal / Glassmorphism]
- Use CSS variables for all colors
- Add subtle noise or grain texture overlay
- Cards should have gradient backgrounds, not images

FEATURES
- Category filter pills: All, Politics, Tech, Business, World, Science, Sports
  (single-select, "All" is default)
- Each card shows: category badge (color-coded), source badge (icon + name),
  title, excerpt, timestamp
- Breaking cards get a pulsing red "BREAKING" badge with animation
- Cards animate in with staggered fade-up on load and filter change

DATA
- Use a hardcoded JS array of 15–18 sample news objects with fields:
  tier, category, source, title, excerpt, time, live (boolean)
- Render everything client-side with vanilla JS (no frameworks)

STYLE RULES
- Use 2 Google Fonts: a serif display font for titles, a sans-serif for body
- No generic fonts (Inter, Arial, Roboto)
- Responsive: collapse to single column on mobile
- Smooth transitions on hover (lift + shadow)

Output a single self-contained HTML file. No external dependencies
except Google Fonts CDN.
